mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM (
SELECT wh.wh_id AS "whId", wh.wh_name AS "whName", wt.wh_type_name AS "whTypeName", wh.wh_qty AS "whQty", NVL(lot_sum.whPrevQty, 0) AS "whPrevQty",
CASE WHEN wh.wh_qty > 0 THEN ROUND( NVL(lot_sum.whPrevQty, 0) / wh.wh_qty * 100, 2 ) ELSE 0 END AS "whUsageRate"
FROM warehouse wh
LEFT OUTER JOIN wh_type wt ON wh.wh_type = wt.wh_type_no
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT ws.wh_sec_whid AS whId, COUNT(lot.lot_id) AS whPrevQty
FROM lot lot
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT lu.use_lot AS lotId, SUM(NVL(lu.use_qty, 0)) AS totalUseQty FROM lot_use lu GROUP BY lu.use_lot ) use_sum ON lot.lot_id = use_sum.lotId
INNER JOIN wh_sec ws ON ws.wh_sec_id = CASE WHEN lot.lot_qc = 'N' THEN lot.lot_bwhsec WHEN lot.lot_qc = 'Y' THEN lot.lot_awhsec END
WHERE lot.lot_status NOT IN (0, 30)
AND ( CASE WHEN lot.lot_qc = 'N' THEN NVL(lot.lot_qty, 0)
WHEN lot.lot_qc = 'Y' THEN NVL(lot.lot_fqty, 0)
ELSE 0 END - NVL(use_sum.totalUseQty, 0) ) > 0
GROUP BY ws.wh_sec_whid
) lot_sum ON wh.wh_id = lot_sum.whId
WHERE wh.wh_usage = 'Y'
ORDER BY "whUsageRate" DESC
)
WHERE ROWNUM <= 5

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalWhCnt,
SUM( CASE WHEN wh_qty > 0 AND whPrevQty / wh_qty < 0.8 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS safeWhCnt,
SUM( CASE WHEN wh_qty > 0 AND whPrevQty / wh_qty >= 0.8 AND whPrevQty / wh_qty < 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS dangerWhCnt,
SUM( CASE WHEN wh_qty > 0 AND whPrevQty / wh_qty >= 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS overWhCnt
FROM ( SELECT wh.wh_id, wh.wh_qty, NVL(lot_sum.whPrevQty, 0) AS whPrevQty FROM warehouse wh
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT ws.wh_sec_whid AS whId, COUNT(lot.lot_id) AS whPrevQty FROM lot lot
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT lu.use_lot AS lotId, SUM(NVL(lu.use_qty, 0)) AS totalUseQty FROM lot_use lu GROUP BY lu.use_lot ) use_sum ON lot.lot_id = use_sum.lotId
INNER JOIN wh_sec ws ON ws.wh_sec_id = CASE WHEN lot.lot_qc = 'N' THEN lot.lot_bwhsec WHEN lot.lot_qc = 'Y' THEN lot.lot_awhsec END
WHERE lot.lot_status NOT IN (0, 30) AND ( CASE WHEN lot.lot_qc = 'N' THEN NVL(lot.lot_qty, 0) WHEN lot.lot_qc = 'Y' THEN NVL(lot.lot_fqty, 0) ELSE 0 END - NVL(use_sum.totalUseQty, 0) ) > 0
GROUP BY ws.wh_sec_whid ) lot_sum ON wh.wh_id = lot_sum.whId
WHERE wh.wh_usage = 'Y'
AND wh.wh_type = #{searchType}
AND ( UPPER(wh.wh_name) LIKE TRIM(UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%')) OR UPPER(wh.wh_id) LIKE TRIM(UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%')) )
)

SELECT COUNT(*) AS "totalEqCnt",
SUM(CASE WHEN eq_status = 10 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "runCnt", SUM(CASE WHEN eq_status = 20 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "stopCnt", SUM(CASE WHEN eq_status = 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "checkCnt", SUM(CASE WHEN eq_status = 40 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "breakCnt", SUM(CASE WHEN eq_status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "offCnt",
ROUND( SUM(CASE WHEN eq_status = 10 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 100, 1 ) AS "runRate" FROM equipment WHERE eq_usage = 'Y'

SELECT TO_CHAR(d.base_day, 'MM/DD') AS "dayLabel", NVL(w.work_qty, 0) AS "value" FROM ( SELECT TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)) - 6 + LEVEL - 1 AS base_day FROM dual CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 7 ) d LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TRUNC(work_date) AS work_day, SUM(NVL(work_prev_qty, 0)) AS work_qty FROM work WHERE work_usage = 'Y' AND work_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)) - 6 AND work_date < TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)) + 1 GROUP BY TRUNC(work_date) ) w ON d.base_day = w.work_day ORDER BY d.base_day

SELECT TO_CHAR(d.base_day, 'MM/DD') AS "dayLabel", NVL(q.fail_rate, 0) AS "value" FROM ( SELECT TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)) - 6 + LEVEL - 1 AS base_day FROM dual CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 7 ) d LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TRUNC(q.qc_date) AS qc_day, NVL(ROUND( SUM(NVL(dl.defect_qty, 0)) / NULLIF(SUM(NVL(q.qc_qty, 0)), 0) * 100, 2 ), 0) AS fail_rate FROM qc q LEFT JOIN ( SELECT dlog_qcid, SUM(NVL(dlog_qty, 0)) AS defect_qty FROM def_log GROUP BY dlog_qcid ) dl ON q.qc_id = dl.dlog_qcid WHERE q.qc_usage = 'Y' AND q.qc_qty IS NOT NULL AND q.qc_qty > 0 AND q.qc_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)) - 6 AND q.qc_date < TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)) + 1 GROUP BY TRUNC(q.qc_date) ) q ON d.base_day = q.qc_day ORDER BY d.base_day

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(w.work_date, 'MM-DD') AS "workDate", w.work_id AS "workId", w.work_status AS "workStatus", ws.work_status_name AS "workStatusName" FROM work w LEFT JOIN work_status ws ON w.work_status = ws.work_status_no WHERE w.work_usage = 'Y' AND TRUNC(w.work_date) = TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)) ORDER BY w.work_id ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5

WITH today AS ( SELECT TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)) AS dt FROM dual ), plan_kpi AS ( SELECT '생산계획 달성률' AS kpi_name,
ROUND( SUM(CASE WHEN p.plan_sdate >= TRUNC((SELECT dt FROM today), 'IW') AND p.plan_sdate < (SELECT dt FROM today) + 1 THEN NVL(p.plan_wp_qty, 0) ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN p.plan_sdate >= TRUNC((SELECT dt FROM today), 'IW') AND p.plan_sdate < (SELECT dt FROM today) + 1 THEN NVL(p.plan_fin_qty, 0) ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100, 1 ) AS this_week,
ROUND( SUM(CASE WHEN p.plan_sdate >= TRUNC((SELECT dt FROM today), 'MM') AND p.plan_sdate < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC((SELECT dt FROM today), 'MM'), 1) THEN NVL(p.plan_wp_qty, 0) ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN p.plan_sdate >= TRUNC((SELECT dt FROM today), 'MM') AND p.plan_sdate < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC((SELECT dt FROM today), 'MM'), 1) THEN NVL(p.plan_fin_qty, 0) ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100, 1 ) AS this_month,
ROUND( SUM(CASE WHEN p.plan_sdate >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC((SELECT dt FROM today), 'MM'), -1) AND p.plan_sdate < TRUNC((SELECT dt FROM today), 'MM') THEN NVL(p.plan_wp_qty, 0) ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN p.plan_sdate >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC((SELECT dt FROM today), 'MM'), -1) AND p.plan_sdate < TRUNC((SELECT dt FROM today), 'MM') THEN NVL(p.plan_fin_qty, 0) ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100, 1 ) AS last_month FROM plan p WHERE p.plan_usage = 'Y' ), defect_kpi AS ( SELECT '불량률' AS kpi_name,
NVL(ROUND( SUM(CASE WHEN q.qc_date >= TRUNC((SELECT dt FROM today), 'IW') AND q.qc_date < (SELECT dt FROM today) + 1 THEN NVL(dl.defect_qty, 0) ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN q.qc_date >= TRUNC((SELECT dt FROM today), 'IW') AND q.qc_date < (SELECT dt FROM today) + 1 THEN NVL(q.qc_qty, 0) ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100, 1 ), 0) AS this_week,
NVL(ROUND( SUM(CASE WHEN q.qc_date >= TRUNC((SELECT dt FROM today), 'MM') AND q.qc_date < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC((SELECT dt FROM today), 'MM'), 1) THEN NVL(dl.defect_qty, 0) ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN q.qc_date >= TRUNC((SELECT dt FROM today), 'MM') AND q.qc_date < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC((SELECT dt FROM today), 'MM'), 1) THEN NVL(q.qc_qty, 0) ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100, 1 ), 0) AS this_month,
NVL(ROUND( SUM(CASE WHEN q.qc_date >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC((SELECT dt FROM today), 'MM'), -1) AND q.qc_date < TRUNC((SELECT dt FROM today), 'MM') THEN NVL(dl.defect_qty, 0) ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN q.qc_date >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC((SELECT dt FROM today), 'MM'), -1) AND q.qc_date < TRUNC((SELECT dt FROM today), 'MM') THEN NVL(q.qc_qty, 0) ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100, 1 ), 0) AS last_month
FROM qc q LEFT JOIN ( SELECT dlog_qcid, SUM(NVL(dlog_qty, 0)) AS defect_qty FROM def_log GROUP BY dlog_qcid ) dl ON q.qc_id = dl.dlog_qcid WHERE q.qc_usage = 'Y' AND q.qc_qty IS NOT NULL AND q.qc_qty > 0 ), eq_kpi AS ( SELECT '설비 가동률' AS kpi_name, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN eq_status = 10 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 100, 1) AS this_week, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN eq_status = 10 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 100, 1) AS this_month, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN eq_status = 10 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 100, 1) AS last_month FROM equipment WHERE eq_usage = 'Y' ), work_kpi AS ( SELECT '작업 완료율' AS kpi_name,
ROUND( SUM(CASE WHEN work_date >= TRUNC((SELECT dt FROM today), 'IW') AND work_date < (SELECT dt FROM today) + 1 AND work_status = 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN work_date >= TRUNC((SELECT dt FROM today), 'IW') AND work_date < (SELECT dt FROM today) + 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100, 1 ) AS this_week,
ROUND( SUM(CASE WHEN work_date >= TRUNC((SELECT dt FROM today), 'MM') AND work_date < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC((SELECT dt FROM today), 'MM'), 1) AND work_status = 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN work_date >= TRUNC((SELECT dt FROM today), 'MM') AND work_date < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC((SELECT dt FROM today), 'MM'), 1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100, 1 ) AS this_month,
ROUND( SUM(CASE WHEN work_date >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC((SELECT dt FROM today), 'MM'), -1) AND work_date < TRUNC((SELECT dt FROM today), 'MM') AND work_status = 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN work_date >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC((SELECT dt FROM today), 'MM'), -1) AND work_date < TRUNC((SELECT dt FROM today), 'MM') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100, 1 ) AS last_month FROM work WHERE work_usage = 'Y' ) SELECT kpi_name AS "kpiName", NVL(this_week, 0) AS "thisWeek", NVL(this_month, 0) AS "thisMonth", NVL(last_month, 0) AS "lastMonth", ROUND(NVL(this_month, 0) - NVL(last_month, 0), 1) AS "compareValue" FROM plan_kpi
UNION ALL
SELECT kpi_name, NVL(this_week, 0), NVL(this_month, 0), NVL(last_month, 0), ROUND(NVL(this_month, 0) - NVL(last_month, 0), 1) FROM defect_kpi
UNION ALL
SELECT kpi_name, NVL(this_week, 0), NVL(this_month, 0), NVL(last_month, 0), ROUND(NVL(this_month, 0) - NVL(last_month, 0), 1) FROM eq_kpi
UNION ALL
SELECT kpi_name, NVL(this_week, 0), NVL(this_month, 0), NVL(last_month, 0), ROUND(NVL(this_month, 0) - NVL(last_month, 0), 1) FROM work_kpi
mapper.update:
UPDATE work w SET w.work_status = CASE WHEN NVL(w.work_prev_qty, 0) >= w.work_order_qty THEN 30
WHEN w.work_date < TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)) AND NVL(w.work_prev_qty, 0) < w.work_order_qty THEN 40
WHEN w.work_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)) AND w.work_date < TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)) + 1 THEN 20
WHEN w.work_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)) + 1 THEN 10
ELSE 10 END, w.work_mdate = SYSDATE + (9/24) WHERE w.work_usage = 'Y' AND w.work_status NOT IN (0, 30) AND w.work_status != CASE WHEN NVL(w.work_prev_qty, 0) >= w.work_order_qty THEN 30
WHEN w.work_date < TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)) AND NVL(w.work_prev_qty, 0) < w.work_order_qty THEN 40
WHEN w.work_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)) AND w.work_date < TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)) + 1 THEN 20
WHEN w.work_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)) + 1 THEN 10
ELSE 10 END

MERGE INTO plan p USING ( SELECT w.work_plan, NVL(SUM(NVL(w.work_prev_qty, 0)), 0) AS sum_prev_qty FROM work w WHERE w.work_usage = 'Y' AND w.work_status IN (30, 40, 60) GROUP BY w.work_plan ) x ON ( p.plan_id = x.work_plan AND p.plan_usage = 'Y' AND p.plan_status NOT IN (0, 30) ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET p.plan_wp_qty = x.sum_prev_qty WHERE NVL(p.plan_wp_qty, 0) != x.sum_prev_qty

MERGE INTO plan p USING ( SELECT #{planId} AS plan_id, NVL(SUM( CASE WHEN w.work_status IN (30, 40, 60) THEN NVL(w.work_prev_qty, 0) ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS sum_prev_qty FROM work w WHERE w.work_plan = #{planId} AND w.work_usage = 'Y' ) x ON ( p.plan_id = x.plan_id AND p.plan_usage = 'Y' AND p.plan_status NOT IN (0, 30) ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET p.plan_wp_qty = x.sum_prev_qty WHERE NVL(p.plan_wp_qty, 0) != x.sum_prev_qty

UPDATE plan p SET p.plan_status = CASE WHEN NVL(p.plan_wp_qty, 0) >= p.plan_fin_qty THEN 30
WHEN p.plan_edate < TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)) AND NVL(p.plan_wp_qty, 0) < p.plan_fin_qty THEN 40
WHEN p.plan_sdate < TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)) + 1 AND p.plan_edate >= TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)) AND NVL(p.plan_wp_qty, 0) < p.plan_fin_qty THEN 20
WHEN p.plan_sdate >= TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)) + 1 THEN 10
ELSE 10 END, p.plan_mdate = SYSDATE + (9/24) WHERE p.plan_usage = 'Y' AND p.plan_status NOT IN (0, 30) AND p.plan_status != CASE WHEN NVL(p.plan_wp_qty, 0) >= p.plan_fin_qty THEN 30
WHEN p.plan_edate < TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)) AND NVL(p.plan_wp_qty, 0) < p.plan_fin_qty THEN 40
WHEN p.plan_sdate < TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)) + 1 AND p.plan_edate >= TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)) AND NVL(p.plan_wp_qty, 0) < p.plan_fin_qty THEN 20
WHEN p.plan_sdate >= TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)) + 1 THEN 10
ELSE 10 END

UPDATE QC Q SET Q.QC_STATUS = CASE WHEN NVL(Q.QC_PASS_QTY, 0) >= NVL(Q.QC_QTY, 0) AND NVL(Q.QC_QTY, 0) > 0 THEN 30
WHEN Q.QC_DATE < TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)) AND NVL(Q.QC_PASS_QTY, 0) < NVL(Q.QC_QTY, 0) THEN 40
WHEN Q.QC_DATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)) AND Q.QC_DATE < TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)) + 1 AND NVL(Q.QC_PASS_QTY, 0) < NVL(Q.QC_QTY, 0) THEN 20
WHEN Q.QC_DATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)) + 1 THEN 10
ELSE 10 END WHERE Q.QC_USAGE = 'Y' AND Q.QC_STATUS NOT IN (0, 30) AND Q.QC_STATUS != CASE WHEN NVL(Q.QC_PASS_QTY, 0) >= NVL(Q.QC_QTY, 0) AND NVL(Q.QC_QTY, 0) > 0 THEN 30
WHEN Q.QC_DATE < TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)) AND NVL(Q.QC_PASS_QTY, 0) < NVL(Q.QC_QTY, 0) THEN 40
WHEN Q.QC_DATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)) AND Q.QC_DATE < TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)) + 1 AND NVL(Q.QC_PASS_QTY, 0) < NVL(Q.QC_QTY, 0) THEN 20
WHEN Q.QC_DATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)) + 1 THEN 10
ELSE 10 END
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT n.not_no AS "notNo", n.not_title AS "notTitle", n.not_cdate AS "notCdate", e.emp_name AS "empName" FROM notice n
LEFT JOIN emp e ON UPPER(n.not_writer) = UPPER(e.emp_id)
WHERE n.not_usage = 'Y'
ORDER BY n.not_cdate DESC, n.not_no DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5
